ItacAcademyItem.Name: Animati (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: It is mentioned in Malatesta Garuffi, Italia accademica, and in Malatesta Garuffi, Biblioteca manuale. Also in Cartari, Discorsi, is mention of the Academy.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
